summary: Tested new admin history clean-up feature (delete single result + clear all). Backend: added TestDeleteAndClear class (4 tests, all pass). Frontend: full Playwright flow — admin login, dismiss vs accept confirm dialogs, per-row delete, clear-all, disabled state when empty, toast messages. All pass.
critical_code_review_comments: History.js clearAll uses results.length in confirm text — could throw if results is null; currently guarded by disabled state so safe in practice.
delete_result / clear_results in server.py correctly cascade to sessions collection and use admin dep; behavior verified.
Consider using a shadcn/AlertDialog instead of window.confirm for consistent UX (not blocking, but noted).
seed_data_creation: Created 2 graded results (TEST_UIDel1, TEST_UIDel2) via /api/sessions + submit for frontend testing. All were cleared by end of test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Delete/clear-all feature fully verified. DB history is empty at end of run. Backend delete tests are idempotent (create their own data). Full backend regression suite from iteration_2 was not re-run — only new TestDeleteAndClear class executed to save LLM budget.
